summary: Integrated ADR 0197 into current main by replaying the repo-managed Dify runtime and public edge, re-verifying the governed Dify tool bridge through api.lv3.org, and preserving packaged API gateway runbook compatibility plus linked-worktree smoke tracing on production.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml --with requests pytest tests/test_dify_smoke.py tests/test_runbook_use_cases.py tests/test_runbook_executor.py tests/test_postgres_vm_access_policy.py -q` returned `14 passed in 0.49s` after rebasing ADR 0197 onto current `origin/main`.

`make converge-dify` completed successfully from `codex/ws-0197-main-finish`, with the final recap reporting `docker-runtime-lv3 ok=111 changed=0 failed=0`, `nginx-lv3 ok=38 changed=4 failed=0`, and `postgres-lv3 ok=43 changed=4 failed=0`.

`make converge-api-gateway` completed successfully from the same rebased worktree, with the final recap reporting `docker-runtime-lv3 ok=234 changed=106 failed=0` while packaging the restored runbook compatibility surfaces into the runtime bundle.
`dig +short agents.lv3.org` returned `65.108.75.123`, and `curl -fsS -D - https://agents.lv3.org/healthz` returned `HTTP/2 200` with `{"step":"finished","setup_at":"2026-03-28T00:11:21"}`.
`curl -fsS -D - https://api.lv3.org/v1/health` returned the expected canonical `HTTP/2 401` auth envelope instead of the earlier broken public edge behavior.

`curl -fsS -D - -X POST https://api.lv3.org/v1/dify-tools/get-platform-status -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-LV3-Dify-Api-Key: $(cat /Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.local/dify/tools-api-key.txt)" -d '{}'` returned `HTTP/2 200` after the replay.

The private tunnel `curl -fsS -D - http://127.0.0.1:18094/healthz` returned `HTTP/1.1 200`, and `uv run --with requests --with pyyaml python3 scripts/dify_smoke.py --base-url http://127.0.0.1:18094 --admin-email baditaflorin@gmail.com --admin-password-file /Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.local/dify/admin-password.txt --init-password-file /Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.local/dify/init-password.txt --tools-api-key-file /Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.local/dify/tools-api-key.txt --export-path platform/dify-workflows/lv3-dify-smoke.yml` completed with `tool_count: 11`, `trace_configured: true`, and exported `platform/dify-workflows/lv3-dify-smoke.yml`.

notes: This mainline receipt supersedes the earlier branch-local receipt `2026-03-28-adr-0197-dify-live-apply`, which correctly captured the original Hetzner DNS write brownout but no longer reflects current platform truth.

The latest-main replay was performed from the isolated worktree `/Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.worktrees/ws-0197-main-finish` on branch `codex/ws-0197-main-finish` after rebasing ADR 0197 onto current `origin/main`.
The replay preserved the Dify internal port move from `8093` to `8094` so the existing Plane proxy on `docker-runtime-lv3` remains untouched while Dify stays healthy.

The packaged API gateway runtime already contained newer ADR 0209 use-case service structure on current main, so the compatibility repair intentionally preserved that richer implementation while adding legacy `delivery_surface` handling, the `portal` alias mapping, and the optional `repo_root` argument on `WindmillWorkflowRunner`.
